query: SELECT afericao, COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(SUM(CAST(quantidade AS DECIMAL(12,3))), 3) as litros, ROUND(SUM(CAST(valorTotal AS DECIMAL(12,2))), 2) as valor FROM vendas v INNER JOIN tanques t ON v.tanqueId = t.id INNER JOIN postos p ON t.postoId = p.id LEFT JOIN produtos pr ON t.produtoId = pr.id WHERE p.nome LIKE '%SUPER PETROLEO%' AND p.ativo = 1 AND dataVenda >= '2026-02-03 00:00:00.000' AND dataVenda <= '2026-02-04 23:59:59.999' GROUP BY afericao;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 41wMkRgfnqozYTj.root --database GsoitYr3hHiyZTgQLwp9sV --execute SELECT afericao, COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(SUM(CAST(quantidade AS DECIMAL(12,3))), 3) as litros, ROUND(SUM(CAST(valorTotal AS DECIMAL(12,2))), 2) as valor FROM vendas v INNER JOIN tanques t ON v.tanqueId = t.id INNER JOIN postos p ON t.postoId = p.id LEFT JOIN produtos pr ON t.produtoId = pr.id WHERE p.nome LIKE '%SUPER PETROLEO%' AND p.ativo = 1 AND dataVenda >= '2026-02-03 00:00:00.000' AND dataVenda <= '2026-02-04 23:59:59.999' GROUP BY afericao;
